name: Clear Secure, Inc. (CLEAR)
description: Clear Secure, Inc. is an American technology company that operates a secure identity platform designed to streamline the travel experience and enhance security. By utilizing biometric data, such as fingerprints and iris scans, the company provides members with expedited access through security checkpoints at major airports, stadiums, and other venues. Headquartered in New York City, Clear Secure, Inc. focuses on creating a frictionless, member-centric identity verification system that integrates seamlessly into various environments, helping to improve efficiency and safety for travelers and venue operators alike.
